title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at WeWork India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at WeWork India
jsonLd.description:
WeWork India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About WeWork India:
WeWork India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WeWork India!
